name: track-pms
description: Reads and writes Track PMS reservations, guests, units, owners, CRM contacts, and unit types through the Track PMS API.

risk.read: external Track PMS API read of reservation, guest, unit, owner, CRM contact, and unit type data
risk.write: external mutation of Track PMS reservations, units, owners, and CRM contacts; no destructive-admin or elevated-scope actions modeled
risk.approval: create_reservation, create_unit, and create_owner require approval (each creates a billable/bookable real-world resource record); update_unit, update_owner, create_contact, update_contact, and delete_contact execute without approval
